data.title: Barclays Discloses Positions in Dalata Hotel Group Securities
data.description:
Barclays ( (GB:BARC) ) has issued an update.

Barclays PLC has disclosed its positions in the securities of Dalata Hotel Group PLC as part of the Irish Takeover Panel’s regulatory requirements. The disclosure indicates Barclays’ interests and short positions in Dalata’s securities, reflecting a total of 1.12% in interests and 1.14% in short positions. This announcement is part of the regulatory compliance process and may impact stakeholders by providing transparency about Barclays’ investment activities in Dalata, potentially influencing market perceptions and investor decisions.

More about Barclays

Barclays PLC is a major global financial services provider engaged in retail banking, credit cards, corporate and investment banking, and wealth management with a strong presence in Europe, the Americas, Africa, and Asia. The company focuses on delivering innovative financial solutions and services to its diverse client base, ranging from individuals to large corporations.

YTD Price Performance: 15.76%

Average Trading Volume: 49,004,940

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £43.54B

data.title: CSPC Innovation Reports Significant Financial Decline in 2024
data.description:
CSPC Pharmaceutical Group ( (HK:1093) ) has provided an update.

CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of CSPC Pharmaceutical Group, released its 2024 annual financial report, showing a significant decline in revenue and net profit compared to the previous year. The report highlights a 21.98% decrease in revenue and an 87.63% drop in net profit attributable to shareholders, indicating financial challenges that may impact the company’s market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

More about CSPC Pharmaceutical Group

CSPC Pharmaceutical Group Limited is a Hong Kong-incorporated company operating in the pharmaceutical industry. It focuses on the development, manufacturing, and marketing of pharmaceutical products, with a significant presence in the Chinese market.

data.title: RLJ Lodging CFO Sean Mahoney Announces Retirement
data.description:
RLJ Lodging ( (RLJ) ) has shared an update.

Sean Mahoney, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of RLJ Lodging Trust, announced his retirement effective May 2025, after seven years with the company and over 30 years in the hospitality REIT industry. His departure is not due to any disagreement with the company, and he will assist in the transition process until his retirement. RLJ Lodging Trust has initiated a succession process to find his replacement, ensuring continued stability and strategic positioning in the industry.

More about RLJ Lodging

RLJ Lodging Trust is a self-advised, publicly traded real estate investment trust that owns premium-branded, rooms-oriented, high-margin, urban-centric hotels. Their properties are located in major urban markets, catering to business, leisure, and other travelers.

data.title: Corero Network Security Announces Year-End Results and Investor Engagements
data.description:
Corero Network Security ( (GB:CNS) ) has issued an announcement.

Corero Network Security, a specialist in DDoS protection, announced it will release its year-end results for 2024 on April 1, 2025. The company plans to host an investor presentation on April 3, 2025, which will be open to existing and potential shareholders. Additionally, Corero’s management will present at the Planet MicroCap Showcase in the US on April 23, 2025, to engage with investors. These events aim to enhance investor relations and provide insights into the company’s performance and strategic direction.

More about Corero Network Security

Corero Network Security is a leading provider of DDoS protection solutions, specializing in automatic detection and protection solutions with network visibility, analytics, and reporting tools. The company operates in complex edge and subscriber environments to ensure internet service availability. Headquartered in London, Corero has operational centers in Marlborough, Massachusetts, USA, and Edinburgh, UK, and is listed on the London Stock Exchange’s AIM market and the US OTCQX market.

data.title: Dyadic International Secures $4.5M for Vaccine Development
data.description:
Dyadic International ( (DYAI) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 20, 2025, Dyadic International announced a $4.5 million funding award from CEPI to accelerate the development of protein-based vaccines using its C1 fungus technology. The initiative aims to reduce vaccine development timelines significantly, potentially enabling vaccines to enter Phase 1 trials in just 35 days compared to the traditional four to six months. This approach could also lower production costs and increase accessibility, particularly in regions with less established manufacturing infrastructure, aligning with the global 100 Days Mission to expedite vaccine readiness against pandemic threats.

More about Dyadic International

Dyadic International, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on the efficient large-scale manufacture of proteins for use in human and animal vaccines and therapeutics, as well as non-pharmaceutical applications including food, nutrition, and wellness. The company utilizes its proprietary C1-cell protein production platform to speed development, lower production costs, and improve performance of biologic vaccines and drugs.

YTD Price Performance: -18.05%

Average Trading Volume: 84,063

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $40.83M

data.title: Eastside Distilling’s Strategic Expansion with MagicBlocks Launch
data.description:
Eastside Distilling ( (BLNE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 20, 2025, Beeline Holdings, Inc. announced the official public launch of MagicBlocks, an AI-driven sales agent platform, set for April 1, 2025. MagicBlocks, which completed its Beta phase with 16 clients, is positioned as a scalable, international solution. Beeline retains an equity stake in MagicBlocks, which was spun off as an independent company. This launch marks Beeline’s strategic expansion beyond mortgage origination into SaaS-based revenue streams, enhancing its market positioning by offering proprietary AI technology solutions. Earlier in the year, Beeline also introduced BlinkQC, an automated quality control solution for mortgage operations, further showcasing its commitment to innovation and efficiency in the industry.

More about Eastside Distilling

Beeline Holdings, Inc., formerly known as Eastside Distilling, Inc., is an emerging FinTech mortgage lender that leverages AI and proprietary technology to streamline the mortgage origination process. The company offers near-instant pre-approvals and aims to transform home loans into a transparent and easy path for consumers.

Average Trading Volume: 58,011

data.title: NIOX Group Receives Revised Acquisition Proposal from Keensight Capital
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Circassia Pharmaceuticals ( (GB:NIOX) ).

NIOX Group Plc has received a revised proposal from Keensight Capital for a potential cash offer to acquire the company at 81 pence per share, following a previous offer of 78 pence per share. The board is considering the proposal, which is subject to due diligence, and has also initiated a private sale process to explore other potential offers, though no firm offers have been made yet.

More about Circassia Pharmaceuticals

NIOX Group Plc is a medical device company specializing in point-of-care asthma diagnosis, monitoring, and management solutions.

data.title: BOS Appoints New Leadership Amid Regional Tensions
data.description:
BOS Better Online Solutions ( (BOSC) ) has issued an update.

BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. announced the appointment of Osnat Gur as Board Chair and Avi Dadon as an independent director. This leadership change, announced on March 19, 2025, is expected to bolster BOS’s strategic direction and operational efficiency. Gur, with her extensive experience in B2B marketing and technology, and Dadon, with his background in defense procurement, are poised to enhance the company’s growth and stakeholder value. The announcement comes amid ongoing regional conflicts that could impact BOS’s business operations and financial conditions.

More about BOS Better Online Solutions

BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. is a global integrator of supply chain technologies, operating through three specialized divisions: Intelligent Robotics, RFID, and Supply Chain. These divisions focus on automating industrial and logistics processes, optimizing inventory management, and integrating components into customer products.
